name: QueryDefinition
description: SOAP envelope containing a query definition with schema, operation, selected fields, conditions, and pagination parameters.

operation.description: Query operation type. get returns single record (error if missing), getIfExists returns single or null, select returns multiple records, count returns record count.

lineCount.description: Maximum number of records to return.

select.description: Field selection using XPath node elements.

where.description: WHERE conditions using condition elements with expr attributes.

orderBy.description: ORDER BY clause with sortNode elements.
